description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push. Use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) on different environments (ubuntu-20.04, windows-2019, macos-10.15) with various configurations (ssh, tornado, mpi). For each job, check out the repository, cache conda environment, set up Python, install dependencies, and run tests using pytest with coverage reporting.
